10_so_i_happen_to: So I happen to have a yen for Edam and a hankering for Havarti -- it just shows I have Gouda taste. Certainly Cheddar taste than you.
11_yeah_it_makes_your: Yeah, it makes your Razzle-Dazzle fizzle.
12_thats_why_he_showed: That's why he showed you that thing, after all.
13_talking_behind_my_back: Talking behind my back in front of me again, eh? What am I, gefilte fish?
14_mmmm_mmmmm_nothing_like: Mmmm, mmmmm. Nothing like cheese! I can 'edam' any time, even with all this other junk on it.
15_hi_again_the_boss: Hi again. The boss decided to show off for you. Follow me, and I'll show you around.
16_theres_something_wrong_with: There's something wrong with Erasmus. He was staying up so late practicing the Wizard Whirl game, and now he won't wake up.
18_before_he_was_wired: Before, he was wired. Now, he's unplugged.
1_sort_of_a_cheap: Sort of a cheap peep on a creep?
20_you_dont_expect_me: You don't expect me to eat that, do you?
21_hmmm_pretty_shoddy_workmanship: Hmmm. Pretty shoddy workmanship, if you ask me.
22_i_didnt_know_she: I didn't know she could write.
23_his_skeletons_came_out: His skeletons came out of the closet and the ghost played hostess?
26_a_man_walked_up: A man walked up to a healer. He has a cucumber up his nose, a carrot in his left ear, and a banana in his right ear.
27_healer_healer_whats_the: "'Healer, healer, what's the matter with me?' he asked.
28_youre_not_eating_properly: 'You're not eating properly,' replied the healer.
29_the_ogre_because_hes: The Ogre, because he's here today, and Goon tomorrow?
2_that_entrance_had_to: That entrance had to be seen to be disbelieved.
30_one_sifts_sands_by: One sifts sands by the sea shore, the other shifts sands by the Palace door?
31_all_right_what_is: All right, what is the difference between us?
34_hey_i_resent_that: Hey, I resent that remark. It promotes negative stereotypes of my racial species.
35_im_a_member_of: I'm a member of RABID -- Rodents Against Boring Idiosyncratic Discrimination. Our slogan is 'Rat is where it's at!'
36_dangerous_place_for_rats: Dangerous place for rats -- right next door was Catatonic U.
37_he_who_quests_with: He who quests with zest and bests the rest will own the throne for his home.
38_gotta_go_hero_dont: Gotta go, Hero? Don't be late for your date with fate, mate.
39_shop_til_you_drop: Shop 'til you drop and buy 'til you cry?
3_yeah_itll_really_blow: Yeah, it'll really blow you away.
40_yeah_snow_way_hell: Yeah. Snow way he'll stay in Spielburg this time of year. He's a Med man.
41_in_what_sort_of: In what sort of affairs do you like to meddle?
42_and_if_you_cant: And if you can't be good -- be careful.
43_thats_irrattating_we_rodents: That's ir-rat-tating. We rodents don't gnaw when to quit.
45_dont_ever_get_erasmus: Don't ever get Erasmus really angry. It's not a pleasant sight...
46_let_me_think_a: Let me think... a toolkit, a hand... I know! It must have been the handyman. You see, the 'fix' was in.
48_the_infestation_of_several: The infestation of several thousand baby Antwerps had nothing to do with it, I'm sure.
49_so_i_tend_to: So I tend to foam at the mouth a little...
4_erasmus_was_losing_so: Erasmus was losing, so he blew up the game.
50_yeah_you_need_strong: Yeah, you need strong bones and healthy muscles when you get eaten by monsters. More nutritious that way.
51_he_was_paying_particularly: He was paying particularly close attention to this one redhead.
52_if_he_was_any: If he was any more sedentary, he'd be in a cemetery.
53_so_far_his_favorite: So far, his favorite scenic wonder seems to be a certain redhead.
55_erasmus_can_be_a: Erasmus can be a pain to live with at times, especially when he's swatting flies with Lightning Bolts. Almost burned the house down.
56_ive_come_up_with: I've come up with a new syncopated song:\n'When you're walking with your lady and she screams to see a mouse,\nYou know ya gotta leave her 'cause she's acting like a louse.'
57_what_do_you_think: What do you think I am, a standup comedian?
58_tell_us_oh_great: Tell us, oh great Guru of the magical tower, will you share some of your hard-earned knowledge with us?
5_i_got_to_hand: I got to 'hand' it to you, that's some clue. It's clearly the 'Case of the Purloining Palm Reader.' He'll soon be under 'a wrist.'
60_after_that_entrance_you: After that entrance, you can tell Erasmus has become an incorrigible ham. So try not to 'incorrige' him.
61_one_thing_you_can: One thing you can say about being around Erasmus is that it's never boring.
62_i_dont_make_it: I don't make it to the city often. Too many other things to have fun with. Besides, I get a little nervous in crowds.
63_a_rat_is_like: A rat is like a bard, we're nothing without a tail.
64_thats_it_hello_i: That's it... Hello, I must be going? What's the matter, we suffer from the heartbreak of halitosis or something?
65_erasmus_can_be_irascible: Erasmus can be irascible at times.
66_its_invigorrating_to_see: It's invigor-rat-ing to see you again.
67_as_corratspondent_for_the: As cor-rat-spondent for the Rodent Anti-defamation League, I'm about to cover a real story. Three visually challenged mice are about to sue the life partner of an agricultural engineer for mutilating them unmercifully.
68_theyre_sure_to_win: They're sure to win. They got a first-rat lawyer.
6_that_means_hes_been: That means he's been practicing so he can win this time.
71_be_careful_sounds_like: Be careful. Sounds like a 'wristy' business.
72_but_i_thought_fourarmed: But I thought four-armed was half an octopus.
73_byebye_good_guy_try: Bye-bye, good guy. Try not to die.
74_erasmus_likes_to_watch: Erasmus likes to watch what's going on in Silmaria.
76_erasmus_cant_wait_to: Erasmus can't wait to play you in Wizard's Whirl again. Spends most of the night practicing.
77_horrors_i_president_of: Horrors! I, president of RABID, just found out that people are eating us rodents.
78_i_found_them_listed: I found them listed on a menu -- rat-atouille and chocolate mouse.
79_oh_thats_all_right: Oh, that's all right then. Moose are dangerous.
7_whats_seen_on_the: What's seen on the screen is more clear than the sphere.
80_the_screen_is_keen: The screen is keen -- you can spy unseen. We could see you were on your way here.
81_game_for_a_game: Game for a game -- Erasmus thinks the 'whirl' of you.
82_this_game_has_him: This game has him fired -- he's tired, but he's wired.
83_some_vampire_bats_wanted: Some vampire bats wanted to join RABID, but we had to say no fangs to those suckers. Blood is thicker than water, and they're just not our type.
84_crime_doesnt_pay_enough: Crime doesn't pay... enough. Wait till that hand-some felon meets up with the long arm of the law.
85_im_really_worried_im: I'm really worried. I'm not sure what I would do without Erasmus. If you think of a way to help Erasmus, let me know, okay? Bye.
86_erasmus_seemed_fine_a: Erasmus seemed fine -- a little obsessed with that game, but that's normal, for him.
87_im_starting_to_get: I'm starting to get really worried. I've tried every thing and spell I know trying to wake Erasmus.
88_then_he_had_a: Then he had a snack and he fell asleep and he hasn't woken up since. I'd expect him to be playing the game sleep or no.
89_its_taking_a_lot: It's taking a lot of magic to keep this house up here. I never expected to do this on my own. It's a real drain on my resources, let me tell you.
90_he_was_just_eating: He was just eating those chocolates you sent him, then he zonked out. He's not even snoring! I've never seen him like this -- quiet!
91_but_the_chocolate_box: But the chocolate box said that they were from you! We found them on the platform in Silmaria, and Erasmus assumed you'd left them for him.
92_i_know_the_box: I know the box is around there somewhere. Here, you take it.
93_i_hate_to_disturb: I hate to disturb you guys in your victory and all that, but things don't look good for Silmaria. In fact, things are pretty rotten in Silmaria.
94_i_know_you_wont: I know you won't want to miss out on any fun, so I'm sure you won't mind if I invite you both to a little slumber party. Your job is to put the Dragon to sleep -- permanently.
96_good_luck_you_two: Good luck, you two. You're going to need all the luck you can get. Hmmm... Maybe I can help you just a little bit more.
97_there_you_go_now: There you go. Now you got some real help. That's all I can do for you. Have fun!
98_i_kind_of_figure: I kind of figure you all need some help here.
9_hey_dont_waste_great: Hey, don't waste great food on ingrates. You know rats like cheese.
